# Burch Contracting

> Licensed general contractor (SC #CLG118679) serving Upstate South Carolina since 1995. Scott Burch and his team build decks, screened porches, covered patios, garages, room additions, ADUs, and handle full home remodeling, commercial upfits, basement finishing, insurance restoration, and ADA accessibility modifications.

Burch Contracting is a local, owner-operated construction and remodeling company based in Gray Court, SC, serving Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, Mauldin, Greenville, Five Forks, Woodruff, and Laurens. BBB A+ rated, fully insured, 35+ years of local experience. Free consultations for every project type below.

## Services

- [Custom Deck Builder](https://burchcontracting.com/outdoor-living/decks): Pressure-treated and composite deck construction, pricing, and timelines.
- [Screened Porch Builder](https://burchcontracting.com/outdoor-living/screened-porches): Screened porches and three-season rooms.
- [Covered Patio Builder](https://burchcontracting.com/outdoor-living/covered-patios): Covered patios and outdoor living spaces.
- [Garage Builder](https://burchcontracting.com/garages): Detached, attached, workshop, and garage-apartment construction.
- [Room Additions](https://burchcontracting.com/additions): Bedroom, master suite, and two-story home additions.
- [ADU Builder](https://burchcontracting.com/adu-builder): Garage apartments and backyard cottages for rental income or family living.
- [Home Remodeling](https://burchcontracting.com/remodeling): Kitchen, bathroom, and whole-house renovations.
- [Commercial Upfits](https://burchcontracting.com/commercial-upfits): Retail, office, and food-service tenant improvements.
- [Basement Finishing](https://burchcontracting.com/basement-finishing): Egress windows, moisture control, and full interior build-out.
- [Insurance Restoration](https://burchcontracting.com/insurance-restoration): Storm and water damage repair and insurance claim assistance.
- [ADA Compliance & Accessibility](https://burchcontracting.com/ada-compliance): Ramps, doorways, and bathroom accessibility modifications.
- [ADA Bath to Shower Conversions](https://burchcontracting.com/ada-bath-to-shower): Roll-in shower conversions for aging-in-place safety.

## Company

- [About](https://burchcontracting.com/about.html): Company history and Scott Burch's background.
- [Projects](https://burchcontracting.com/projects.html): Recent completed local projects.
- [FAQs](https://burchcontracting.com/faqs.html): Common questions about pricing, permits, and process.
- [Contact](https://burchcontracting.com/contact.html): Free consultation request form.
- [Cost Estimator](https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/estimate.html): Interactive project cost calculator.

Local pages with area-specific detail: [Simpsonville](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/simpsonville.html), [Greenville](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/greenville.html), [Fountain Inn](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/fountain-inn.html), [Mauldin](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/mauldin.html), [Five Forks](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/five-forks.html), [Woodruff](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/woodruff.html), [Laurens](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/laurens.html), [Gray Court](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/gray-court.html).
